entries.title: Random/Multiple Cylinder Misfire Detected
entries.summary: The ECM sees misfire activity across more than one cylinder or cannot isolate it to a single cylinder.
firstChecks: Monitor misfire counters on live data

entries.title: Cylinder 1 Misfire Detected
entries.summary: Combustion instability detected on cylinder 1.

entries.title: Cylinder 2 Misfire Detected
entries.summary: Combustion instability detected on cylinder 2.
firstChecks: Check for intake leak at runner 2

entries.title: Cylinder 3 Misfire Detected
entries.summary: Combustion instability detected on cylinder 3.
firstChecks: Compression test if swap does not move the code

entries.title: Cylinder 4 Misfire Detected
entries.summary: Combustion instability detected on cylinder 4.
firstChecks: Check fuel trim on that bank

entries.title: System Too Lean (Bank 1)
entries.summary: Oxygen sensor reports excess oxygen on bank 1 — more air or less fuel than expected.
firstChecks: Inspect intake boots and vacuum lines
Compare MAF grams/sec to spec at idle

entries.title: System Too Lean (Bank 2)
entries.summary: Oxygen sensor reports excess oxygen on bank 2.

entries.title: System Too Rich (Bank 1)
entries.summary: Too little oxygen reported on bank 1 — excess fuel or restricted air.
firstChecks: Look for black smoke or fuel smell

entries.title: Catalyst System Efficiency Below Threshold (Bank 1)
entries.summary: Rear O2 activity suggests the catalytic converter is not storing oxygen effectively on bank 1.
likelyCauses: Upstream misfire or rich condition damaged catalyst
firstChecks: Compare upstream vs downstream O2 waveforms
Verify rear O2 heater and response

entries.title: Catalyst System Efficiency Below Threshold (Bank 2)
entries.summary: Bank 2 catalyst efficiency is below the ECM threshold.
firstChecks: Physical inspection of converter and pipes

entries.title: Coolant Thermostat (Coolant Temperature Below Thermostat Regulating Temperature)
entries.summary: Engine coolant is not reaching operating temperature in the expected time.
firstChecks: Verify warm-up time on live ECT
Replace thermostat if engine runs cool
Check ECT sensor vs IR gun

entries.title: Mass or Volume Air Flow (MAF) Circuit Range/Performance
entries.summary: MAF reading is outside expected range for current engine conditions.
firstChecks: Compare MAF g/s to MAP/VE at idle
Inspect boot between MAF and throttle body

entries.title: Mass or Volume Air Flow (MAF) Circuit Low Input
entries.summary: MAF signal voltage or frequency is lower than expected.
firstChecks: Back-probe MAF signal at idle and snap throttle
Compare to known-good sensor if available

entries.title: Mass or Volume Air Flow (MAF) Circuit High Input
entries.summary: MAF signal is higher than the calibrated range.
firstChecks: Inspect for oil contamination on hot wire

entries.title: O2 Sensor Heater Circuit Malfunction (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
entries.summary: Upstream O2 heater on bank 1 is not drawing expected current.

entries.title: O2 Sensor Heater Circuit Malfunction (Bank 1 Sensor 2)
entries.summary: Downstream O2 heater circuit fault on bank 1.
firstChecks: Swap test only if OEM allows
Check voltage supply with key on
Replace sensor if heater resistance is open

entries.title: EVAP System Leak Detected (Small Leak)
entries.summary: Fuel vapor system failed the small-leak monitor.
firstChecks: Smoke test EVAP lines and charcoal canister
Command purge/vent valves closed and test

entries.title: EVAP System Leak Detected (Large Leak)
entries.summary: A large leak was detected in the evaporative emissions system.
firstChecks: Visual inspection under hood and at tank

entries.title: EVAP System Leak Detected (Very Small Leak)
entries.summary: Very small leak detected — often cap seal or pinhole hose.

entries.title: Exhaust Gas Recirculation Flow Insufficient
entries.summary: EGR flow is lower than commanded for the operating point.
firstChecks: Command EGR open on scan tool and verify movement
Check differential pressure feedback if equipped

entries.title: System Voltage Low
entries.summary: ECM detected supply voltage below the low threshold.
firstChecks: Measure battery at rest and cranking

entries.title: Turbo/Super Charger Underboost
entries.summary: Boost pressure did not reach the target for the given load.
firstChecks: Pressure test charge pipes and intercooler
Check boost solenoid and vacuum lines

entries.title: Turbo/Super Charger Overboost
entries.summary: Boost exceeded the maximum allowed limit.

entries.title: Knock Sensor 1 Circuit Malfunction (Bank 1 or Single Sensor)
entries.summary: Knock sensor signal is missing or out of range.
likelyCauses: Excessive engine noise misread as knock
firstChecks: Listen for mechanical knock or rod bearing noise

entries.title: Crankshaft Position Sensor A Circuit Malfunction
entries.summary: CKP signal is absent or erratic — engine may not start or stall.

entries.title: Camshaft Position Sensor Circuit Malfunction (Bank 1)
entries.summary: CMP signal missing or out of sync with crank signal.
firstChecks: Verify timing marks if chain suspected

entries.title: Crankshaft Position - Camshaft Position Correlation (Bank 1 Sensor A)
entries.summary: Cam and crank signals are not aligned within the calibrated window.
firstChecks: Check oil level and VVT solenoid operation
Mechanical timing inspection if correlation is off

entries.title: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch A Circuit Range/Performance
entries.summary: TPS A reading does not match expected correlation with pedal or secondary sensor.
firstChecks: Graph TPS vs APP on scan tool

entries.title: Idle Control System Malfunction
entries.summary: Idle speed cannot be stabilized by the idle air control system.
firstChecks: Check for aftermarket cam or vacuum leaks

entries.title: Idle Control System RPM Higher Than Expected
entries.summary: Idle RPM is above the target without driver demand.
firstChecks: Inspect all vacuum lines and PCV

entries.title: Fuel Rail/System Pressure Too Low
entries.summary: Measured fuel rail pressure is below command during demand.
firstChecks: Compare commanded vs actual on GDI systems

entries.title: Ignition Coil A Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
entries.summary: ECM detected a fault in the ignition coil A driver circuit.
firstChecks: Measure primary resistance if spec available

entries.title: Transmission Control System Malfunction
entries.summary: Generic transmission fault — additional codes may be stored in the TCM.
firstChecks: Review shift adapt data if supported

entries.title: ECM/PCM Processor Fault
entries.summary: Internal control module self-test failure.

entries.title: Evaporative Emission Control System Malfunction
entries.summary: General EVAP system fault without pinpointing leak size.
firstChecks: Command solenoids on bench or scan tool
